---
title: "Macro Wonders of Uznach"
subtitle: "Uznach · May 2026"
categories:
  - Macro
  - Insects
  - Nature
  - Uznach
date: "2026-05-14"
image: "images/macro_fly_3.JPG"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    lightbox: true
---

Macro shots from a pond near Uznach: flies, a dragonfly, a dying wasp, and a goose family that wouldn't sit still.

### Macro

::: {layout-ncol=3}

![](images/macro_fly_3.JPG){group="uznach" fig-alt="A long-legged fly resting on a green leaf, wings spread"}

![](images/fly_macro.JPG){group="uznach" fig-alt="A fly resting on a cluster of small white wayfaring-tree flowers"}

![](images/fly_macro_2.JPG){group="uznach" fig-alt="A fly feeding among clusters of white blossom"}

![](images/dragonfly.JPG){group="uznach" fig-alt="A slender, long-legged insect perched among small white wildflowers"}

![](images/flower_macro.JPG){group="uznach" fig-alt="Close-up of a yellow iris flower with dew drops on its petals"}

![](images/macro_dying_wasp.JPG){group="uznach" fig-alt="An insect entangled in a fine thread of spider silk, wings spread, suspended in mid-air"}

:::

### Pond Wildlife

::: {layout-ncol=3}

![*Goose Family*](images/duck_family.JPG){group="uznach" fig-alt="A family of geese with several fluffy goslings standing in grass"}

![*Goose Family Swimming*](images/duck_family_swimming.JPG){group="uznach" fig-alt="A goose family swimming together among reeds in a pond"}

![*Frog at the Surface*](images/frog_side.JPG){group="uznach" fig-alt="A green frog floating at the water's surface"}

:::
